'''Aaron Smith''' (born 12 October 1996) is a professional [[rugby league]] footballer who last played as a {{rlp|hk}} for [[Barrow Raiders]] in the [[RFL Championship]].

He has spent time on loan from [[St Helens R.F.C.|St Helens]] at the [[York City Knights]] in [[2019 RFL League 1|Betfred League 1]], [[Hull Kingston Rovers]] in the [[Super League]], and [[Featherstone Rovers]] and the [[Leigh Centurions]] in the [[RFL Championship|Betfred Championship]].

==Background==
Smith was born in [[Newton-le-Willows]], Merseyside, England. 

==Career==
In 2018 he made his [[Super League]] début on loan for [[Hull Kingston Rovers]] against [[Wakefield Trinity]].<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/match/ERLP4038545|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20180109104933/http://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/match/ERLP4038545|url-status=dead|archive-date=January 9, 2018|title=Wakefield Trinity v Hull KR|publisher=BBC}}</ref>
In 2018 he has spent time on loan at [[Featherstone Rovers]]. He played in the [[2019 Super League Grand Final]] victory over the [[Salford Red Devils]] at [[Old Trafford]].<ref name="St Helens give Justin Holbrook the perfect send-off with commanding Grand Final victory over Salford">{{cite web|url=https://www.telegraph.co.uk/rugby-league/2019/10/12/st-helens-vs-salford-red-devils-super-league-grand-final-live/|title=St Helens give Justin Holbrook the perfect send-off with commanding Grand Final victory over Salford|publisher=Telegraph|date=12 October 2019|accessdate=25 October 2019}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.theguardian.com/sport/live/2019/oct/12/st-helens-v-salford-red-devils-super-league-grand-final-live/|title=St Helens 23-6 Salford Red Devils: Super League Grand Final – as it happened|website=The Guardian}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.skysports.com/rugby-league/news/12196/11777123/st-helens-win-2019-super-league-league-leaders-shield/|title=St Helens win 2019 Super League League Leaders' shield|website=Sky Sports}}</ref>

===Leigh Centurions (loan)===
On 22 October 2021, it was reported that he had re-joined [[Leigh Centurions|Leigh]] in the [[RFL Championship]] on a season-long loan.<ref>{{cite web|website=www.saintsrlfc.com|date=22 Oct 2021|accessdate=22 Oct 2021|title=Aaron Smith to join Leigh Centurions on season long loan|url=https://www.saintsrlfc.com/2021/10/22/aaron-smith-joins-leigh-centurions-on-season-long-loan/}}</ref>

===Barrow Raiders===
On 23 Jan 2024 it was reported that he had signed for [[Barrow Raiders]] in the [[RFL Championship]] on a 2-year deal.<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=23 Jan 2024|author=Ben Olawumi|title=Championship move confirmed for Leigh Leopards utility, former Super League Grand Final winner|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/championship-move-confirmed-for-leigh-leopards-utility-former-super-league-grand-final-winner}}</ref>

On 1 November 2025 it was reported that he had left [[Barrow Raiders]]<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=1 Nov 2025|accessdate=2 Nov 2025|author=Ben Olawumi|title=Super League Grand Final winner among quartet of departures from Championship club|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/aaron-smith-among-four-departures-from-barrow}}</ref>
